query:
SELECT 'metas' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM metas WHERE alunoId = (SELECT id FROM alunos WHERE name LIKE '%Millena%' LIMIT 1)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'sessoes' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM mentoring_sessions WHERE alunoId = (SELECT id FROM alunos WHERE name LIKE '%Millena%' LIMIT 1)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'competencias' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM assessment_competencias WHERE assessmentPdiId IN (SELECT id FROM assessment_pdi WHERE alunoId = (SELECT id FROM alunos WHERE name LIKE '%Millena%' LIMIT 1))
UNION ALL
SELECT 'performance' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM student_performance WHERE externalUserId = (SELECT externalId FROM alunos WHERE name LIKE '%Millena%' LIMIT 1);
